{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20844_1
|class_id=20844
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20844_2
|fame=13
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=33
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 10 Divinations, Snail ATK +1<br>Divinations: 400/400
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 10 Divinations, Snail ATK +2<br>Divinations: 400/400
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 Divinations, Snail ATK +3<br>Divinations: 400/400
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 Divinations, Snail ATK +3<br>Divinations: 400/400
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 10 Divinations, Snail ATK +3<br>Divinations: 400/400<br> (Awakened)
}}
